query_text: versatile one-ski quiver around 96-100mm waist for mixed conditions

results.explanation: Nordica Enforcer 100 excels in: stability_at_speed, playfulness. Solid on: forgiveness. Review: "The titanal makes it damp and stable at speed." Review: "Good stability at moderate to high speeds." Review: "Not punishing."

Elan Ripstick 96 excels in: forgiveness, playfulness. Solid on: stability_at_speed. Review: "Not as stable as full titanal skis at speed but lighter and more maneuverable." Review: "Forgiving enough that I'm not scared but capable enough to push me." Review: "I only ski one week per year and need one ski for everything."

Nordica Santa Ana 98 excels in: stability_at_speed, forgiveness. Solid on: playfulness. Review: "Stability is good, playfulness is moderate." Review: "still damp, stable, and versatile." Review: "Handles everything I encounter without being too demanding."

ground_truth.reason: 102mm waist, slightly wider than ideal but versatile
